issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
response: If you have Company Admin or Team Admin access, open Teams Management, choose the relevant team, and use the Users tab to manage that person. To remove them from the team, locate the user in the list and select the delete icon in the Action column.
justification: Replied using HackerRank guidance on managing team members and removing or locking user access.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.

response: If you're on an eligible monthly self-serve plan, you can pause the subscription instead of canceling it and resume it later when needed. This feature is for individual self-serve subscribers and requires a supported monthly plan.
justification: Replied using HackerRank guidance on pausing an eligible self-serve subscription.

issue: Claude has stopped working completely, all requests are failing

justification: The user's issue describes Claude stopping completely and all requests failing. Evidence 1 directly addresses a scenario where Claude might stop working, specifically related to the Claude Desktop app and Cowork sessions. This aligns with the user's reported problem and provides a relevant troubleshooting step. Evidence 2 is about Claude Code fixing failing tests, which is not applicable here. issue: I want Claude to stop crawling by website
subject: Website Data crawl
response: Anthropic uses various robots to gather data from the public web for model development and to retrieve web content at users' direction. Site owners can control which of its web robots may access their content by updating their site preferences or robots settings to allow the robots they want and block the ones they don't. You can find more information on the specific robots Anthropic uses and how to set your site preferences on our website.
justification: Replied using Anthropic guidance for site owners who want to control crawler access.

issue: one of my employee has left. I want to remove them from our hackerrank hiring account
subject: Employee leaving the company
response: If you have Company Admin or Team Admin access, open Teams Management, choose the relevant team, and use the Users tab to manage that person. To remove them from the team, locate the user in the list and select the delete icon in the Action column. If you need to prevent them from signing in entirely, you can also lock the user from the Users tab; the account stays available for reuse.
justification: Replied using HackerRank guidance on managing team members and removing or locking user access.

issue: i am a professor in a college and wanted to setup a claude lti key for my students
subject: Claude for students
response: To set up the Claude LTI in Canvas, create a Claude LTI developer key in Canvas Admin > Developer Keys, install the app by Client ID under Admin > Settings > Apps, then enable Canvas under Claude for Education Organization settings > Connectors using your Canvas domain, Client ID, and Deployment ID.
justification: Replied using Claude for Education guidance on setting up the Canvas LTI integration.

issue: i am in US Virgin Islands and the merchant is saying i have to spend minimum 10$ on my VISA card, why so?
subject: Visa card minimum spend
response: In the U.S. and U.S. territories such as the U.S. Virgin Islands, merchants may require a minimum transaction amount of up to US$10 for credit cards only. If a merchant applies a minimum to a Visa debit card or asks for more than US$10 on a credit card, notify your card issuer.
justification: Replied using Visa consumer support guidance on minimum transaction amounts.
